ns0:entry.ns0:title: LinkedInLearning/advanced-terraform-3099246
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LinkedInLearning/advanced-terraform-3099246
Language: hcl
This is a repo for the LinkedIn Learning course Advanced Terraform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-cloudfront-s3-cdn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-cloudfront-s3-cdn
Language: hcl
Terraform module to easily provision CloudFront CDN backed by an S3 origin

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-documentdb-cluster
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-documentdb-cluster
Language: hcl
Terraform module to provision a DocumentDB cluster on AWS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-dynamic-subnets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-dynamic-subnets
Language: hcl
Terraform module for public and private subnets provisioning in existing VPC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
Language: hcl
Terraform module to generate well-formed JSON documents (container definitions) that are passed to the aws_ecs_task_definition Terraform resource

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-terraform-modules/terraform-oci-vcn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-terraform-modules/terraform-oci-vcn
Language: hcl
A reusable and extensible Terraform module that provisions a VCN on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure

ns0:entry.ns0:title: semgrep/semgrep-rules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/semgrep/semgrep-rules
Language: hcl
Semgrep Community Edition rules, maintained by Semgrep and the community. Free to use under the Semgrep Rules License.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
Language: hcl
Creates one or more Cloud Storage buckets and assigns basic permissions on them to arbitrary users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
Language: hcl
Allows managing a keyring, zero or more keys in the keyring, and IAM role bindings on individual keys
